title: VBU Results 2026 - Key Highlights

detail.title: VBU Results 2026 - Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Vinoba Bhave University has released the VBU Result 2026 for BCA 4th Semester Under CBCS Examination of 2023–26 held in December 2025. Students can check their VBU BCA 4th sem result, download the marksheet and verify grades online at the official website vbu.ac.in via the result notice page vbu.ac.in/notice/Result.

content.text: The Vinoba Bhave University (VBU) Result 2026 for BCA 4th Semester Under CBCS Examination of 2023–26, held in December 2025, has been officially declared on the university’s result notice portal.

This latest VBU BCA 4th Sem Result 2026 was published on 23 March 2026, enabling students of the 2023–26 batch to check their subject-wise marks, total score and pass status online. By visiting the official website https://www.vbu.ac.in/ and the dedicated result section https://www.vbu.ac.in/notice/Result, candidates can download the VBU BCA 4th Semester marksheet using their roll number.

Vinoba Bhave University has added a new update to its result notices for the BCA 4th Semester (CBCS) 2023–26 batch, conducted in December 2025. The result is published as a provisional marksheet/notice listing roll-number-wise performance, which students can access directly from the official VBU website.

rows: Result of BCA (4th Semester) Under CBCS Examination of 2023–26 held in the month of December, 2025
UG Result – Provisional BCA 4th Sem Result 2026
Online PDF / notice with roll-number-wise marks

content.text: Vinoba Bhave University hosts the BCA 4th Semester Under CBCS Examination of 2023–26 result under its online Result Notice section. Through the table below, students can directly reach the VBU result page and then open the detailed result PDF or notice for their BCA 4th Sem exam.

links.label: Result of BCA (4th Semester) Under CBCS Examination of 2023–26 held in the month of December, 2025

sections.heading: How to Check VBU BCA 4th Semester Result 2026?

content.text: Follow these steps to check the Vinoba Bhave University BCA 4th Semester Result 2026 for the CBCS Examination of 2023–26 held in December 2025. These instructions ensure students reach the correct official result page and download their marksheet smoothly.

items: Visit the official Vinoba Bhave University website: https://www.vbu.ac.in/.
On the homepage, go to the “Notice / Result” section or directly open https://www.vbu.ac.in/notice/Result in your browser.
On the Result page, look for the notice titled “Result of BCA (4th Semester) Under CBCS Examination of 2023–26 held in the month of December, 2025” dated 23 March 2026.
Click on the result notice link; a PDF file / result document will open in a new tab.
Use the search function (Ctrl+F) in the PDF and type your Roll Number to quickly find your result entry.
Check your name, roll number, subject-wise marks, total marks and result status (Pass/Fail) carefully in the BCA 4th Sem result sheet.
Download or print the PDF as your provisional VBU BCA 4th Semester marksheet 2026 and keep it safe until the original marksheet is issued by the university or college.

structured_links.label: Result of BCA (4th Semester) Under CBCS Examination of 2023–26 held in the month of December, 2025
